titleStmt.title: SII 10.506: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu

No. 506. (A.R. No. 328 of 1905.) ON A BROKEN SLAB LYING IN THE MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE RUINED TEMPLE OF ŚIVA CALLED MOBBUDĒVAḶAM NEAR UPPARAPALLE, PRODDATUR TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT. Ś. 1235 (?). (Pramādīcha)

summary.p: Very much damaged. Seems to refer to the grant of certain village in Mulikināḍu presumably to a temple for the merit of Pratāpa Rudradēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
sēvaṁttiya mavarṣṣamarṣṣasahitā māṇi
kyamauḷiprabhābhājā saṁnatiśāli naiva sirasā
dēvā svayaṁ pādayōḥ . bhaktyadrēkavaśā di
vāttavilasat sasnēhādivāṁkurā vighnēśō vida
dhātu va ssakaruṇākallōlitāṁgaśriyaḥ
. śrōtraṁ yasya sabha ssamīranivahaśvāsō bhavē ttē
jasāṁ rūpaṁ nētrayugaṁ jalānimahatō vēṣa
sya pādāgrataḥ . daṁṣṭrāgrē mahatīmahī vilasi
tā pōtrapradēśē diśaḥ pāyā dādivarāha
rūpalasitō viṣṇu ściraṁ va ssuraḥ . tu
mastakē laḷitatuṁgaśriṁgē mahila
validviradajruṁbhakuṁbhastalē . harē
sitapōtradaṁṣṭrāgragā karōtu
rirasau varāhaḥ purā . dēvi
paramēṣṭhinaḥ . smaratā
varadā mudā .
tējagatānidhaḥ . Avatā
lōkavaṁditā
kuṭunyastamā

illegible
tasiddhanādhasya svasti śakavaruṣaṁbu
lu 1236Agu nēṁṭi pramādisaṁvatsara śrāvaṇa The figures 1236 seem to be an error for 1235. The cyclic year pramādīca misspelt as pramādi in the inscription, corresponds to the latter year and not to the former. [The date Śaka 1236 cited in the inscription is correct, as it was the current Śaka year; there are many instances where the current year is cited. Pramādin found in the record is the correct form of the name while Pramādīcha, which is also current, is a corruption. The syllable cha added for the sake of metre being taken with the name of the year.—N.L.R.]
śu 2 bu nāṁḍu svasti śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara
kākatiyyapratāparudradēvamahārājulaku
gaṁḍamūrtti mukuṁda
paraśirāmabirudaṁka rudrabiruda
ṁḍḍikōṭadurggavibhāḷa mallidēvata
svayaṁbhūnādhadēvadivyaśrīpā
hārāya nānā
kaṁgāru mulakināṁḍu
vīḍlu Aṣṭabhōgatējasvā
mahā
mariśiṁci sarvva
lost
Digital edition of SII 10.506 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
